title: roegneria subsecunda
intro: Roegneria subsecunda, also known as the "Roegneria grass", is a type of plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. It is a type of grass native to mountainous regions, particularly in China and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Roegneria subsecunda can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and extract, which are used to treat a range of health issues and provide relief from symptoms associated with certain diseases.
